title: UnityImageManifest
description: Schema for Docker image manifests used by the Docker-only Unity build platform.

contractVersion.description: Image contract version. Major bump = breaking entrypoint change. Workflows validate compatibility.

imageReference.description: Full image reference including registry, repository, and tag. Example: ghcr.io/buzzelstudio/unity-builder:6000.0.26f1-android-v1.0.0

imageDigest.description: Immutable image digest. Workflows should resolve and pin to this.

unityChangeset.description: Unity changeset hash for the editor version.

baseImageReference.description: Base image used to build this image. Example: unityci/editor:6000.0.26f1-android-3

baseImageDigest.description: Digest of the base image at build time.

osVersion.description: Operating system version inside the container. Example: Ubuntu 22.04

modules.description: Unity modules installed in this image. Example: ["android", "android-sdk-ndk-tools", "android-open-jdk"]

supportedScriptingBackends.description: Scripting backends available in this image.

androidSdkVersion.description: Android SDK platform version. Only present for android variant.

androidNdkVersion.description: Android NDK version. Only present for android variant.

jdkVersion.description: JDK version. Only present for android variant.

toolingVersion.description: Version of organization tooling layer added on top of base image.

buildTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the image was built.

sourceCommit.description: Git commit SHA of the unity-build-workflows repo used to build this image.

tags.description: All tags published for this image.

sbomReference.description: URI or artifact name of the SBOM generated for this image.

scanReport.description: URI or artifact name of the vulnerability scan report.
